center.name: 阿亚库乔
center.summary: 阿亚库乔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Peruvian wren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Peruvian wren is found in the Andes of Peru between the departments of Amazonas and Ayacucho

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Peruvian wren is found in the Andes of Peru between the departments of Amazonas and Ayacucho
